item.title: #capcut #capcutpioneer ⬆️⬆️Use this CapCut template to make your own kitten dance edit, cute pet meme, or KATSEYE-style sound edit. Add your own clip or use it for a funny three-person dance moment. Three kittens are dancing to “Spencer Hill Cool” by GFY
